name: AULA S13 RGB Gaming Mouse with Side Buttons
highlights: The Aula S13 Gaming Mouse is a versatile RGB gaming mouse designed for both casual and competitive gamers
Featuring adjustable 800-2400 DPI , 7 programmable buttons , and an optical sensor , it provides precision and customization
The ambidextrous design ensures comfort for any grip style, while RGB Chroma lighting adds immersive visuals
With a 20 million click lifespan and a high polling rate of up to 1000 Hz, the Aula S13 delivers durability and quick responsiveness, making it a top choice for PC gaming on Windows XP, 7, 8, and 10
description: AULA S13 RGB Gaming Mouse Price in Pakistan and Key Features: Adjustable DPI : 800-2400 DPI with 4 levels for precision control. RGB Chroma Lighting : Customizable vibrant lighting effects. Durable Buttons : 20 million click lifespan. Ergonomic Design : Ambidextrous and comfortable for all grip types. High Polling Rate : 125-1000 Hz for fast response times. Extra-Long USB Cable : 1.8m cable for flexibility. Feature Specification Type Gaming Mouse Sensor Optical Connection USB Programmable Button
